test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN01: Verify login page loads with all required UI elements

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Verify Login Page Loaded
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.
Verify login page loads with all required UI elements visible.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

test.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN02: Verify successful login with valid credentials

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.

kw.name: Verify Login Page Loaded
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Element To Be Ready
kw.doc: Waits until the provided locator is visible and enabled.
Verify login page loads with all required UI elements visible.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Enter Username
kw.doc: Enter username into username textbox.

kw.name: Enter Password
kw.doc: Enter password into password textbox.

kw.name: Click Sign In Button
kw.doc: Click the SIGN IN button.

kw.name: Verify Successful Login Redirect
kw.doc: Verify successful authentication redirects the user to the home page.

kw.name: Close Browser Session
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes all open browser instances for the current execution.

test.status: Location did not contain '/washtabui/login' in 10 seconds.

test.name: AUT-WT-LOGIN03: Verify login fails with incorrect password

Close All Browsers

Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser To Url
Open Browser Session
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Opens a browser session on a blank page and maximizes the window.

kw.name: Go To Url
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Navigates the current browser session to the provided URL.
Opens a browser session and navigates to the provided URL.
Opens the login page in a new browser session using the provided URL.
